assessment.note: He can identify wins but explicitly says he is unsure whether they meet the team bar, which is a strong clarity gap with mild engagement signal.

new_queue.label: Team bar mismatch
new_queue.name: When your wins miss the team bar, where does the mismatch usually show up?
new_queue.description: Drills into his stated uncertainty about the team bar by locating the recurring mismatch in concrete work.

new_queue.label: Quality in examples
new_queue.name: What does good brand design look like in your work right now?
new_queue.description: Surfaces his current quality bar in concrete terms rather than abstractions.

new_queue.label: Recent work sample
new_queue.name: Which recent piece of work best shows your current standard?
new_queue.description: Pulls out a specific example that can be used to anchor feedback.

new_queue.label: Feedback changed what
new_queue.name: What changed in your work after the last round of feedback?
new_queue.description: Checks whether prior feedback translated into behavior, not just agreement.

new_queue.label: Work slowing you down
new_queue.name: What part of your growth feels most blocked right now?
new_queue.description: Identifies the main constraint on near-term development.

new_queue.label: Next step agreement
new_queue.name: What should we agree you will do before we next meet?
new_queue.description: Closes on a concrete commitment without reopening new topics.
